case_title: GARY DIGGS VS. RAINBOW GROCERY COOPERATIVE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DIGGS, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT RAINBOW GROCERY COOPERATIVE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIGGS, GARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAINBOW GROCERY COOPERATIVE, INC. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH A BASIS FOR MONEY DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) SERVED NOV-15-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAINBOW GROCERY COOPERATIVE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RAINBOW GROCERY COOPERATIVE, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGGS, GARY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2010 - JUDGMENT.
